mapper.sql: id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from ws_address where user_id = #{userId} order by is_default desc, id desc
select from ws_address where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ws_address(user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default) values (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: update ws_address set receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, is_default = #{isDefault} where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from ws_address where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update ws_address set is_default = 0 where user_id = #{userId}
update ws_address set is_default = 1 where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
